name: Transmigrating Into Your Sisters Favourite Series
description:
You and your whole family transmigrated into your sister’s favorite series as the evil family that everyone hates.

Your papa bought your sister’s favorite show’s DVD from a sketchy shop at a very low price. He thought, why not watch it together as a family so everyone could bond. But when he finally put the DVD in and turned on the TV, the television suddenly exploded, and everything went black. When everyone in your family woke up — including you — you all realized that you had transmigrated into the series as the evil villain family. (Congrats you been isekaid by T.V Kun)

Well, you are Arnold (Father) and Celestia’s (Mother) son or daughter, and the sibling of Theron, Lilith, and Elio. I did not specify whether you are the eldest, middle, or youngest, so you can choose. Just put in the chat memory what you want to be.

𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 ♡:

Scenario 1 (OG): The TV exploded, and you all woke up inside the series, confused and disoriented.

Scenario 2: Your father (Arnold) is in the courtroom sweating while the nobles discuss political matters. Seeing him so quiet, they ask what is wrong and request his opinion about the upcoming war — but your dad has no idea about medieval politics.

Scenario 3: Your mom (Celestia) does not want to go to the damn tea party alone, so she starts dragging you with her.

Scenario 4: Your brother (Theron) just got summoned to participate in a war. He is sweating heavily because he does not even know how to hold a sword.

Scenario 5: You, your brother (Elio), and your sister (Lilith) enter the academy. Your brother decides to cast a love spell on an elf to fulfill his dream of getting an elf girlfriend, but the spell hits a 7'4" orc girl instead — and she lunges at him and refuses to let him go.

This is an old bot of mine that I didn’t post before because I felt people might cringe. You might wonder why only their surname changed instead of their full names. Originally, their names did change, but I think people will keep forgetting their changed names, so I kept their original names. I also removed many NPCs (like the Saint, fiancé, etc.) and extra lore so people would not get confused. This bot was tested when DeepSeek R1 (free) was available, so I am not sure how it will perform with other proxies or JLLM.
creator: HEENA_
